result.content: FINAL_ANSWER: No, the resonance is physically impossible. JUSTIFICATION: There is a massive dimensional gap between the two scales. The ratio of the Compton frequency (fc) to the Unruh frequency (fU) is given by fc / fU = mc3 / (kB a). For cosmological acceleration a approx cH0, the Unruh frequency is extremely low (cosmological scale), whereas the Compton frequency of any known particle is extremely high (subatomic scale). This many-orders-of-magnitude disparity prevents any physical resonance.
